# Aldridge & Charles Marine

> Bespoke yacht stewardship for a closed roster of principals.

## Who we are

Aldridge & Charles Marine, also known as ACMarine, is a private marine office. We attend to a small number of yacht-owning principals across the Mediterranean, the Caribbean, and the Pacific Northwest. We do not advertise. We do not scale. We answer.

The office was founded by two friends who could not find the marine firm they wanted to use themselves. Our standard, since the first day, has been quiet competence: privacy as a service, restraint as a discipline, and time at sea as the only metric that matters.

## Services

### i. Yacht Management
Flag, finance, compliance, crew. We act as the principal's shoreside office, removing every operational decision that should not reach the saloon. Day-to-day vessel operations, accounts, insurance, regulatory filings, payroll, and contracts are handled by us under retainer.

### ii. Brokerage & Acquisition
Off-market vessels, selectively presented. We do not chase listings. We do not push transactions. Sea trials happen in our time, surveys are conducted by people we have known for two decades, and a purchase process is measured in months rather than weeks.

### iii. Refit & Project Oversight
From cosmetic refinishment to engineering re-power, we serve as the owner's representative shipyard-side. We sit through the work, audit the invoices, and remain at the yard until the launch is right and the paperwork is closed.

### iv. Crew & Concierge
A telephone number that does not change. Captains and chefs we have known for two decades. Provisioning, berths, customs, transit, on-shore logistics. The standing rule is that nothing said aboard leaves the vessel.

## Principles

- One principal, one director, one telephone number.
- No referral fees, no kickbacks, no surprises on the invoice.
- Annual books reviewed by independent maritime counsel.
- Closed roster. Introductions come from clients, captains, and a small number of trusted brokers.

## Locations

Monaco, Antibes, Newport, Seattle.

## Contact

Write to office@acmarine.com. The director on duty will respond within two working days, usually fewer.
